document.source_title: IPL 2026 to begin on March 28, final scheduled for May 31

claims.evidence_text: IPL 2026 will start on March 28, two days after what the BCCI had originally planned.

claims.claim_text: The final of IPL 2026 is scheduled for May 31.

entities.name: Kolkata Knight Riders
entities.description: Home base in Kolkata, West Bengal.
entities.evidence_text: Kolkata (in West Bengal) and Chennai (in Tamil Nadu) are the home bases for Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR).

entities.name: Chennai Super Kings
entities.description: Home base in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.
entities.evidence_text: Kolkata (in West Bengal) and Chennai (in Tamil Nadu) are the home bases for Chennai Super Kings (CSK).

entities.name: Rajasthan Royals
entities.evidence_text: Assam's capital Guwahati is the second venue for Rajasthan Royals (RR).

entities.name: Royal Challengers Bengaluru
entities.evidence_text: the opening match of the tournament will be played, as it will feature defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB).

events.event: IPL franchises informed about the start date change
events.evidence_text: The IPL had informed the franchises on December 15 2025.
